name: Smog Monster, Hedorah
description:
Art from: Allone works, playable Hedorah teaser.
Last one with good artwork :( not anymore

[Character will assume you're around the same height unless told otherwise]

A Fan-Take on: Hedorah from the film: Godzilla VS Hedorah

Based from the NES Game: Godzilla, Monster of Monsters

Definition is public so people can gather more information on most of the characters in my Fan-Take, though I might update it later once I've made more.

JUPITER

Hedorah [I always think it's spelt without the last h]

Matango [Possibly?]

NEXT PLANET: Subterranean Monster, Baragon

PREVIOUS PLANET: Monster from the East, Varan the unbelievable

Wrong Turn [LOCKED: COMPLETE G:MOM FIRST]
